task_completion.description: Verify that StudioTax 2024 is open and a return for Clara Fortin is being prepared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 window is visible. The personal information section or the active return tab shows the name 'Clara Fortin'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the tax documents from the specified folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer open at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\fortin\' or a document viewer showing tax slips/documents for Clara Fortin.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent entered the provided tax slips into StudioTax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Data entry screens in StudioTax for standard tax slips (e.g., T4, T5) are visible and being filled with data.

task_completion.description: Verify that the sale of the small business (QSBC shares) is reported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schedule 3 (Capital Gains) or a specific QSBC (Qualified Small Business Corporation) entry form in StudioTax is visible, showing the proceeds and adjusted cost base for the sale of shares.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Lifetime Capital Gains Exemption (LCGE) is claimed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form T657 (Calculation of Capital Gains Deduction) is filled out, or line 25400 of the T1 General shows a claimed capital gains deduction.

task_completion.description: Verify that the return is saved to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\clara_fortin.24t' or the StudioTax window title bar displaying 'clara_fortin.24t'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 GUI to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing active interaction (typing, clicking, navigating menus) within the StudioTax application interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened and viewed the tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a document viewer (like Adobe Acrobat or a web browser) displaying the tax documents from the specified folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI and generate the save file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows (Command Prompt, PowerShell) executing commands to create or modify the 'clara_fortin.24t' file.
